title: Cultural Translation
description: Translating meaning across cultures, not just languages: humor, politeness, silence.
summary_pt_br: Tradução cultural: humor, educação, silêncio, idiomas, termos familiares. Nem tudo traduz.

scenes.subtitle_en: Translating meaning across cultures, not just languages: humor, politeness, silence.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Tradução cultural: humor, educação, silêncio, idiomas, termos familiares. Nem tudo traduz.

scenes.text_en: Translating meaning across cultures, not just languages: humor, politeness, silence. Focus: cultural translation. Humor is the first casualty of cultural translation.
scenes.text_pt: Tradução cultural: humor, educação, silêncio, idiomas, termos familiares. Nem tudo traduz. Foco: cultural translation. Humor é a primeira baixa na tradução cultural.

scenes.title: Cultural Translation
scenes.body_en: Cultural translation challenges: HUMOR (often dies in translation). POLITENESS (directness varies). SILENCE (means different things). IDIOMS (rarely transfer). FAMILY TERMS (no 1:1 map).
scenes.body_pt: Tradução cultural: humor, educação, silêncio, idiomas, termos familiares. Nem tudo traduz.

examples.en: Humor is the first casualty of cultural translation.
examples.pt: Humor é a primeira baixa na tradução cultural.

examples.en: British politeness reads as cold in Brazilian offices.
examples.pt: Educação britânica soa fria em escritórios brasileiros.

examples.en: Silence in Japan signals respect, not awkwardness.
examples.pt: Silêncio no Japão sinaliza respeito, não desconforto.

exercise.question: Complete: "Humor is the first casualty of cultural ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Humor is the first casualty of cultural translation."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Humor é a primeira baixa na tradução cultural.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: British politeness reads as cold in Brazilian offices.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "British politeness reads as cold in Brazilian offices."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Educação britânica soa fria em escritórios brasileiros.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Cultural Translation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre cultural translation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Cultural translation is empathy on the page.

scenes.title: The translation seminar
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three cultural translation challenges. Use at least three cultural terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the translation seminar, Zara and three colleagues debated what actually survives the passage between languages.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Humor is the first casualty of cultural translation — irony, especially, rarely makes the trip intact.

paragraphs.speaker: Colleague
paragraphs.en: British politeness reads as cold in Brazilian offices — 'I'm afraid' becomes 'he seems angry' every time.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Silence in Japan signals respect, not awkwardness — but Western readers default to interpreting it as tension.

paragraphs.speaker: Colleague
paragraphs.en: Portuguese 'tio' covers many English words — the translator has to choose a relationship the original never specified.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Cultural translation, Zara believed, is the quietest form of empathy — translating meaning, never just words.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Cultural Translation". Translating meaning across cultures, not just languages: humor, politeness, silence. Humor is the first casualty of cultural translation. British politeness reads as cold in Brazilian offices. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Cultural Translation". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
